items.title: Buzz Aldrin sells famous felt-tip pen that helped launch Apollo from the Moon

items.title: Keep hedges and shrubs in tip-top shape with EGO’s 26-inch cordless electric trimmer bundle at a new $195 Amazon low
items.summary: Over at Amazon you can pick up the EGO Power+ 56V 26-inch Cordless Electric Hedge Trimmer with 2.5Ah battery for $195 shipped. Normally fetching $279 at full price, we’ve only seen this package discounted to $229 this year, while early summer 2025 was the last time we saw it fall all the way down to its previous $199 low. The deal here, though, is coming in $4 under that previous low for $84 total savings, marking a new all-time low from Amazon.

items.title: Sheetz is quitting VMware, migrating 11,000 virtual machines

In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters, xAI claims Terry Wayne Harwood "knowingly and intentionally used Grok to circumvent safeguards, alter nonconsensual images, and generate and distribute CSAM," breaching the […]

items.title: Brendan Carr plans to let broadcast giants dominate the airwaves
items.summary: The Federal Communications Commission will vote next month on whether a single company can own broadcast stations that reach more than 39 percent of US TV households. In a Breitbart op-ed on Wednesday, Republican Chair Brendan Carr announced an August 6th vote to end the national ownership cap rule, which was intended to prevent one […]

items.title: Get three Tapo SolarCam 1080p outdoor wireless security cameras at their $120 low ($60 off) last seen during Prime Day
items.summary: We spotted Amazon offering a return low price on the Tapo SolarCam 1080p Outdoor Wireless Security Camera 3-Pack for $119.99 shipped, after clipping the on-page $40 off coupon. This budget-friendly security package goes for $180 in full, while discounts since then have only dropped the costs to $160, while the single-camera options have gone as low as $40. The deal here starts already down at $160, with the additional $40 savings ($60 total savings) landing things back at the all-time low price that we spotted during last month’s Prime Day event. You’ll also find the solo-camera option down at its $40 low from $50, and even more of this brand’s security deals in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Tesla driver in fatal Texas crash pressed accelerator 100%, NTSB confirms

items.title: Join as a Segway member for free to score the feature-packed 50-mile Max G3 e-scooter at its $1,000 2026 low
items.summary: Following right behind the first-ever discount on the Segway Myon e-bike, the brand is now offering a special members-only promotional deal on its Max G3 Electric Scooter for $999.99 shipped, after joining the brand’s mileage club for free here through July 18, beating out Amazon’s pricing by $200. While you may see it carrying around a $1,500 MSRP direct from Segway, you can more often find it discounted or starting at Amazon at $1,200, while discounts usually drop it between $1,100 and $1,050, though there was a fall in January to $1,002, as well as some drops further as low as $1,000 – most recently occurring during June’s Prime Day event. Now, you’re getting another chance at Prime Day pricing with the $200 markdown off the going rate (and $500 off the MSRP) for the best price we have tracked in 2026.

items.title: Mid-week Apple Books and audiobook deals from $2
items.summary: Today’s lineup of the best Apple Books deals is now ready, including titles like The Storm of Echoes, Sonic the Hedgehog, Hemlock Bay, Beneath a Broken Sky, Venomous, The Lost Constitution, The Mountains We Call Home, Where the Wildflowers Grow, and more. Just be sure to dive into the $50 off AirPods Pro 3 to upgrade you audiobook experience, M5 MacBook Air models at $150 off, Series 11 down at $299 and these iPhone 17 Pro models at $220 off. The books await below.

You could also run around with people on the call in a shared virtual […]

items.title: Hisense’s 2026 E7 Cinema Mini-LED TVs return to Prime Day lows from $398
items.summary: Hisense has been delivering some serious bang for your buck in the smart TV space for some time now, and it’s 2026 releases continue that tradition. You can actually save even more in some cases when opting for the models running on Amazon’s Fire TV platform as opposed to the Google TV options, and we wanted to highlight some of the more affordable models today – the 2026 4K Mini-LED E7 Cinema Smart Fire TV models have returns to Amazon Prime Day all-time lows starting from $398 shipped.

items.title: Now live again: Sony’s 2026 fully automatic PS-LX5BT Turntable with Bluetooth is over $100 off at Amazon, now at $399
items.summary:
Update 6/15: After going out of stock, this deal is live again at Amazon.

If you’re looking to upgrade your turntable or get into vinyl for the first time, the Sony models are a great option in my experience and its 2026 model PS-LX5BT Wireless Bluetooth Turntable is now within $1 of the lowest price Amazon has offered it for at over $100 off.

items.title: Sign up for a Costco Gold Star Membership for $65 and get a $50 Digital Costco Shop Card
items.summary: How can you keep costs low when you end up burning through a quarter tank of gas just running errands all week. Instead of going from store to store and loading up in small bursts, it might be easier if you consolidated and got all your shopping done at once. It might sound hard to pull off, but if you might be surprised by what you can find at Costco. And right now, you can get a 1-Year Costco Gold Star Membership and a $50 Digital Costco Shop Card*, and it’s still just $65.

items.title: Apple bans home services from its upcoming Maps ads
items.summary: Apple has published the policies governing its upcoming Maps advertising business, revealing a strategy that differs from Google’s. The new rules prohibit home services businesses like plumbers, electricians, locksmiths, and roofers from advertising on Apple Maps, along with several other sensitive categories, suggesting Apple is taking a more curated approach to these ads.

items.title: Amazon offering base M5 MacBook Pro at $150 off new list price, M5 Pro/Max up to $400 off
items.summary: The price of the current-generation M5, M5 Pro, and M5 Max lineup has gone up, but if you are looking to land a machine right now, Amazon does at least have some price relief here. The base M5 models are as much as $150 off the new list prices and some of the higher-end 16-inch models are up to $400 off.

items.title: SpaceX falls to $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch

items.title: Heads up! Lexar’s regularly $480 pocket-sized 2TB iPhone SSD is $220 off today
items.summary: We are now tracking a deal at Amazon that drops the Lexar 2TB Professional Go portable SSD in silver down to $249.99 shipped. This particular drive originally launched at $300 but has sold for as much as $480 in recent months amid rising memory prices and limited supply. While today’s deal does not quite match the $230 Prime Day low it recently hit, it is still an excellent price given how SSD deals are so hard to come by these days. You’re still looking at substantial savings here at 47% off, so be sure to grab it before the price climbs again.
